title: CodeCleanRequest
description: Inputs for the code_clean skill (CCW-MVP13). Scans Python files for quality issues without modifying the filesystem.

root.description: Directory to scan recursively for .py files. Resolved to an absolute path at runtime.

scan_only.description: When true (default), no filesystem changes are made. Write mode is not yet implemented.

emit_plan.description: When true, add a 'plan' field to outputs with suggested remediation actions for each finding.
